TextENGNew: ...What happened?
She heard something. A strange sizzling sound... like the air itself was vibrating.
A sound she'd never heard before... or rather, an unpleasant sound that she refused to dig up the memory of hearing before.
The sound of something burning, creaking, and collapsing...
The sound of something's form being warped... Yes... a sound like it's roaring its death throes...
She exhaled the burning heat from the back of her throat.
After that cough, Tomoe's faint consciousness was gradually restored... and she slowly opened her eyes.
She saw the stars twinkling in the jet-black night sky. Lightly glancing around, she could see a bright full moon floating in the sky.
...She felt something cold and soft against her back.
Based on the distinct aroma and the tingling sensation striking the skin on the back of her neck, Tomoe realized she was lying on her back on the grass.
She tried to get up, but a numbing pain ran all through her body... and she couldn't help but let out a moan.
...Why on earth was she lying here?
...Why was her body refusing to do her bidding?
She couldn't recall how the current situation had come to be, as if it had completely vanished from her memory.
And... she'd been hearing those unpleasant sounds almost constantly, making her eardrums and even her skin quake.
Where... is this place?
And what on earth was I doing...?
Suddenly, Tomoe sensed something off in the distance... She desperately turned her creaky neck to look off to the side.
Beyond that, she found a bright red flame burning before her eyes... along with a plume of smoke that was not quite black or white.
Then she noticed an airplane right in the middle of it, rolled over at an unnatural angle.
While absentmindedly gawking at that, Tomoe endured the pain in her elbows to raise her upper body.
The plane had one wing leaning on the grass off to the side of the runway, and one of the engines was scraped against the ground, spewing flames.
...And, looking more closely at one side... it was missing one of the wheels on the landing gear.
Losing that would've thrown it off balance and prevented it from getting the necessary lift for takeoff.
What's more...
"...Is that...?"
Turning to look back, she saw a broken-down car twisted well beyond its original shape, lying on the ground with fire spewing from within.
...It looked familiar. How could it not?
That was the police car Tomoe drove into the plane's wheel just as it was about to take off.
"That's right... I..."
Tomoe gasped when she finally remembered the situation.
...Immediately after that, she felt severe pain stabbing at her chest, and coughed for a while... until a nasty smelling sticky liquid spurted from her mouth.
(...That's blood.)
She stared absentmindedly at the liquid spread across the palm of her hand. ...There was apparently a deep cut against the back of her cheek.
No, not just that. Also her left shoulder, her left foot, and her forehead... She had thought that the slimy feeling pulsing across her body was sweat, but she finally realized what it was.
Her whole body was covered in scratches... and she could no longer even feel any sensation below her left knee. It was gone, like it was completely cut off.
Even so...
"...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3149.Why... am I...?"
She couldn't understand how she survived that.
Tomoe was certain she'd driven the car toward the plane... and struck one of the wheels with the body of her car.
It was a direct hit... No doubt about that. And that definitely would've killed her... or at least, it should've.
And yet... why was she still alive? Even if she came out of it intact, there was hardly any chance she'd still be alive, much less conscious...
Perhaps she was already dead... and she was looking at her own corpse burning in the flames inside that car?
Those absurd thoughts clouded her mind... and a strange, mysterious air swirled all around her making her feel uncomfortable.
So, Tomoe stood up and dragged her feet... walking toward the wreckage of the police car.
But after just a few steps... her toe bumped against something lying on the ground. And when she looked down... she saw it was a car door.
The window was shattered and the shape was distorted... but it certainly bore the black and white colors and lettering of the prefectural police department.
And looking up once again toward the car in the flames, the driver's side door was gone, like it had popped right off.
(...Come to think of it, at the time...)
The shadow of the plane's huge wheel was approaching right in front of her, and she could feel the entire body of the car being crunched by the crash... but that moment.

Suddenly, Tomoe's left shoulder was struck by a tremendous shock... and she wasn't wearing her seatbelt, so she inadvertently let go of the steering wheel and her body slammed into the door to her right.
The next moment, the lock keeping the door closed came undone. And then...
The door cleanly swung open, and Tomoe was thrown from the car, slamming into the ground and rolling over and over.
But the impact with the plane's wheel caused the steering wheel to shift and the wheels to turn.
And after colliding with the wheel, the car was flung to the side of the runway, so the ground she hit was grass instead of asphalt.
Plus, she used her quick reflexes to bend down and soften the impact...
She had endured a truly incredible chain of good luck, like rolling a six over and over.
Though her body was covered in wounds... Somehow, she was still alive, conscious, and able to just barely move her body.

She turned around to once again look at the overturned transport plane. The flames hadn't slowed down a bit, and explosive sounds were intermittently belting out, as if some of the instruments inside were bursting.
She worried that the plane's fuel tank would catch fire and blow everything away... but it seems the craft was modified for military use, so it was especially sturdy.
"...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3157.I did it..."
It was a completely unreal scene, like something from a movie she saw back when she was in school.
Maybe this was all a dream or a hallucination? ...A corner of her mind still clung to that illusion.
Nevertheless, she could feel the pain and numbness across her entire body.
It was so intense that she was on the verge of fainting, and that was proof that this was undoubtedly reality.
"...Ah, ahaha...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3159. Serves you right...!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3160. Ahahahaha, ahahahahaha...!!"
...And so, she laughed.

It was so amusing she found it comical... Tomoe felt a refreshing sensation run across her like a cool breeze, and she couldn't contain the laughter bursting up from the pit of her stomach, so she let it all out.
...She had stopped him.
She literally risked her life to make it happen, and pulled it off just in the nick of time.
And the response to that... was very soothing.
Tomoe felt a sense of fulfillment... unlike anything she'd ever experienced in the past.
"Ahahahahahahaha... aahahahahahahaha...!!"
"...What's so funny...?"
The smile vanished from Tomoe's face as soon as she heard that low growling voice... and she slowly turned back in the direction it came from.
A single human silhouette emerged from the darkness.
It stood there facing towards her, occasionally staggering... holding something in its hand, and pointing it her way.
"...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3163.It's been a while... Hanada-kun.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3164. Or should I say... Shirou Hanada."
The clinking of metal and the sound of a gunshot rang out in a flash.
Then something sharp burst from the end of Hanada's hand, and skimmed right beside Tomoe's ear.
"What country greets people like that...?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3166. I've never heard of a place that fires guns at someone to say hello."
"...You really are amazing.@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1152. I thought I killed you, and yet you still live...@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1153. And you even managed to tear down everything we had planned..."
"It's unbelievable..."
"I've never met a detective like you...!"

"...Flattery will get you nowhere.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3168. Or are you using this opportunity to plead for extenuating circumstances?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3169. Then rest easy. I can introduce you to a good lawyer."

Another roar echoed through the air, and this time it gouged out a chunk of her right sleeve, sending it flying. She could feel blood dripping from her upper arm, but at the moment she wasn't even concerned if she was seriously injured.
"...What a lousy shot.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3171. You never took practice at the firing range seriously, did you?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3172. ...Your hands are shaking."

"Hold your tongue!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1158. Why...?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1159. You... you and your father. Why are you always ruining everything...?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1160. Things were finally starting to go well... and yet, you people... always...!!"

"...That's my line.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3174. You killed my father, and even my mother who had nothing to do with this.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3175. It's your fault! You were the one who robbed us of our happiness...!"
"You're wrong!!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1162. Besides, this all started because your father... Yuusuke Minai killed my older brother in the first place!!"
"Your... brother?"

"That's right!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1164. I'll never forget it... It was 13 years ago, in 1970!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1165. In the Shirakaba mountain villa incident... I'm sure you're familiar with it, right?!"
...The Shirakaba mountain villa incident.
Student activist movements were very common around that time period... and it was an especially famous incident where extremists took a building hostage.
The criminal group responsible for the incident robbed a gun store in Tokyo to obtain weapons and ammunition, then fled to the mountains in Nagano prefecture to take refuge.

But, the persistent pursuit of the police made them desperate, and they couldn't stand the hunger or the frigid cold so they attacked a nearby resort, the Shirakaba mountain villa, and took the landlord hostage in order to hold the facility.
(Back then... Dad did shoot and kill one of the criminals.)
Despite constant pressure from the police and from their relatives, the criminal group held the siege for 10 days. What's more, they even opened fire at the police, resulting in several casualties.

On the other hand, the National Police Agency was of the opinion that they should avoid resorting to a forceful solution... but they were no longer able to overlook the situation when casualties started piling up, so they finally ordered officers to rush in.
Several members of Public Security, the riot police, and local officers were injured in the attack, but all members of the criminal group were arrested aside from one.
And that one man... was Kazunori Takiguchi, who was shot and killed by a Public Security detective... Tomoe's father...
"...The student my father fatally shot.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3179. That was your brother, wasn't it...?"
"...My brother was my pride and joy.@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1167. He was just manipulated by that extremist group and coerced to join them."
"And yet, your father shot him dead without even a moment of hesitation...!"

"And yet... reports say he had a gun in hand the moment he was shot.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3181. Plus, at that point he had already killed two people.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3182. And he had already fired at another police officer just before that, seriously injuring him.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3183. ...It's completely natural to take the shot under those circumstances."
"Bullshit!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1170. The others just said that to push their crimes on my brother!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1171. My brother would never do something like that!!"
She at least understood the desire to believe in one's immediate family. If Madoka were in that same position, Tomoe would continue to believe in her until the very end.
...But subsequent forensic investigation clearly proved that Kazunori Takiguchi had fired his gun well before he was killed.
Reality is fair but cruel. ...Feeling disconsolate, Tomoe let out a gentle sigh.

"...I understand why you hated my father and wanted to kill him.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3186. But... how does that justify becoming one of Akihiko Chiba's minions?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3187. To be blunt, it makes no sense."
"Think what you like, but I had my reasons!"
Shirou Hanada... or at the time, Shirou Takiguchi, had been abandoned by his parents before he could even remember, and was living with his elder brother.

Ten years had passed since the end of the war, and society was finally regaining some of its former vitality... but it was still tough for two brothers to make a living without any parents to depend on... so the two of them were always hungry.

Still... Shirou's elder brother was a hard-working man, earning their daily living expenses by doing day labor in construction and delivering newspapers, and he'd forego sleep to spend more time studying.
Eventually, he got accepted into college and began attending as a scholarship student... Shirou was proud of his brother and respected him more than anyone else.

"If he got a good job, he could send me to a good school... That's what he always used to say.@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1174. But those idiots in that student movement group took advantage of my brother's kindness!"

"He never liked fighting to begin with! He understood that it just meant causing other people pain!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1176. So... so, they tricked him with their sweet words about changing society! Making him dance to their tune... and getting him killed!!"
...For Shirou, his brother's death meant more than just losing his caretaker.
These thugs had robbed a gun shop, took hostages, and murdered police officers. ...So as the brother of one of them, his painful daily life was now getting more and more shameful and difficult.
So he wasn't able to go to school, he was forced out of his home, and didn't even have the money to buy food...

Seething with anger and hatred while starving in back alleys... holding a grudge and cursing out the people responsible... Nevertheless, he went on every day without hope, just waiting for death to arrive.
And while living through that hell... one day, he was caught while trying to rob someone... and the man brought him in.
That man... was Akihiko Chiba.
"...And then you were reborn as a politician's lapdog.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3189. ...How great for you."

"Shut up!!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1178. What do you even know?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1179. I had nothing! I was sipping down muddy water!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1180. I endured the humiliation of the old man's mistress being assigned as my wife!"
"Can you even begin to understand how much hatred and resentment I feel after everything I've endured?!"
Hanada fired another shot with his pistol as he shouted that. But his hands must've been quivering, because the bullet grazed the ground far away from Tomoe and bounced.
"Mistress...?"

"Yeah, you heard me!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1183. My wife, and even her child... They're not mine!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1184. She's nothing but a way for the old man to distract himself from the political marriage he has with his current wife!"
"They were forced upon me because it'd look bad if people learned he was the father!"
He was given a wife in name only, who he didn't even love, and a child that wasn't even blood related to him... Nevertheless, he had to play his part amicably...
Tomoe had been blessed with a kind family... so she couldn't imagine how much it hurt Hanada's pride and dignity to maintain a family like that.
"I did what I had to do to survive!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1187. I had no choice!"

"I joined the police just to give the old man another advantage, being able to secretly work things from the inside and manipulate information!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1189. And I did all kinds of other dirty things!!"
"...Even murder?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3192. You sure fell hard off the beaten path."

"Silence!!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1191. If your father... hadn't killed my brother!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1192. If society had been sympathetic to me as the brother of a criminal!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1193. None of this would have come to pass!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1194. This never would have happened!"
"I'm sure it's the same for old man Chiba!"
"If only all doctors seriously wished to save their patients!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1197. If only the corporations dealing with the drugs were prepared for the risks!"
"Then that bastard's foolish scheme would have never have gotten this big!!"
"Can you say otherwise?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1200. Are you even qualified to deny what I've done?!"

"...Yes, I am.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3195. At the very least, the words of a man who does nothing but run away aren't even worth considering.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3196. You're nothing but a coward... Shirou Hanada!!"
Hanada flinched and froze, and in doing so his finger moved the trigger and fired a bullet. It grazed against Tomoe's temple and tore out a few strands of her hair.
...Blood trickled down Tomoe's cheek, staining her collar in red.
Nevertheless... Tomoe stepped forward, moving closer to Hanada.
"In the end... you didn't fight. You just ran away."

"You're the one who didn't make any effort to even consider that someone might be willing to reach out to you before seeking help.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3199. You're the one who took the easy way out, by abandoning the courage to hold on to hope before hating something!"

"You're blaming others for your own mistakes and negligence!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3201. You've trapped yourself alone in a dark world, putting yourself on a pedestal while cursing and looking down on others!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3202. That's what you've become!!"
"What was that...?!"

"You think you're some poor wretch?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3204. You think it's someone else's fault that you ended up in this situation?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3205. You're wrong!@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3206. Your current situation is undoubtedly of your own making!"
"And the most pitiful people of all are the ones you dragged into your mess!!"
"Sh...shut up, shut up, shut up, shut uuuuuup!!!"

"Youko Hiranuma, her friend,@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3209. and Nagisa Ozaki-san.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3210. Just how many people besides my parents have you killed?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3211. Even the most forgiving of gods would consider you beyond redemption...!"
"D...don't go making assumptions!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1205. That girl died jumping out of the car!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1206. I didn't kill her!"
"...Way to let that slip.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3213. So in other words, you did indeed witness Nagisa-san's final moments...?!"
Confronted by that sharp roar pointing out his crimes... Hanada flinched and gasped, then bit at his lip.
...At first, he hadn't planned on talking this much.

He'd been planning to satisfy himself by terrifying her with the fear of impending death before killing her. Then he'd run across the runway into the terminal before the other investigators arrive, and use the crowd as a shield to escape.
And yet, even though Tomoe was heavily wounded and being held at gunpoint... she was completely undaunted, and still trying to pry the truth out of him!
This woman... is incredibly dangerous!
Hanada muttered that to himself as he held the pistol in both hands, feeling more and more killing intent as he aimed the sights directly at Tomoe's heart.

"So... so what does it matter, Minai-san?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1209. You're going to die right here... I'll shoot you dead!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1210. Why bother trying to confirm the culprit at this late hour?!"
"Do you intend to brag about it when you meet up with them on the other side?@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1212. Aahahahaha!!"

"I won't miss this time... There's no way I could miss at this distance!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1214. Those earlier shots were just a threat, an attempt to make you fear for your life... But no longer!!"
"I'll kill you... I'll kill you, I'll kill you, I'll kill you!!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1216. You'll die a dog's death here, killed by scum like me!!"

"All the effort, luck, and talent you've been building up to reach this point will be destroyed in an instant!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1218. You can die lamenting that it was all nothing but a waste of time!!!"

"...@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3216.And you'll be satisfied with that?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3217. Does killing someone make you happy?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3218. What do you gain by destroying someone else's life?"
After saying that... Tomoe gently gazed at Hanada, whose hair was standing on end, his eyes widened with rage and bloodlust.
...Strangely enough, the anger and hatred she'd felt when she drove her car into the plane had calmed down.
In its place... the more she listened to his words, the more she couldn't help but feel another emotion.
"Wh-what are you trying to say...?"
"Maybe you did join the police for Chiba's sake.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3220. But when you were carrying out your duties as an officer, was it all just for him?"
"Was there never a point where you started taking it seriously without even realizing it...?"
"I admit I failed to see you for what you truly are.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3223. But I think I was right to assess you as a talented detective."
"...The work you did and the duties you carried out were more than mere deception, you know?"
"...When Fujita-kun first heard you betrayed us, he refused to believe it.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3226. "I've known him for a long time and I'm certain he'd never do that." ...That's what he told me."

"And when he found out it was unquestionably true, he took it really hard.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3228. Yamamura-san and Yamaoki-san, too... They weren't angry with you, they felt sorry that you'd throw away all the time you invested and your relations with us just to do something wicked..."
Upon hearing that... he gasped.
Memories of Hanada's time at Kakiuchi station revived in his mind.
...He and Fujita attended the police academy together, and they were even promoted to detective around the same time... They had a self-described inseparable relationship.

Unlike Hanada who became a police officer to be Chiba's secret agent, he was a stupid and cheerful fool who willingly confessed this was a childhood dream of his... That was the man named Shingo Fujita.
He was envious. It was frustrating at times, but he was jealous.
But he had a refreshingly straightforward personality... maybe it was because they were always around one another, but he was always fooling around and getting Hanada involved in it.
And then his boss, the section chief of the First Investigation Division, and all the other First Division investigators...
The time he spent with them was hardly insignificant.
The calm everyday life he always dreamed of.
And the sense of accomplishment from resolving a case, even when it was risky.
Weren't those... the things he always wanted?
What he truly wanted was neither money nor power... it was the time and space to meaningfully coexist with others. ...And didn't he already have exactly that?
So, why...?
Why was he here... holding a gun like this...?!

"...Hanada-kun.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3230. Can you really throw away your time as a detective so easily?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3231. It's true that you betrayed us this time,@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3232. but in all those cases beforehand you didn't, right?"

"Was there ever a time you cut corners and didn't take your responsibilities seriously?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3234. You felt genuine regret when things didn't work out, right?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3235. And you were truly happy whenever we resolved a case, weren't you...?"
"...Stop it..."

"Honestly... you have nowhere else to go.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3237. It's probably no longer possible to start over.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3238. ...But you can still go back, can't you?@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe3239. Go back to being the old cynical sharp-tongued Shirou Hanada... who loved cars and believed in justice."
"Stop iiiit!!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1226. That's enooooough!!!"
Along with that blood-spurting scream... tears came spilling from Hanada's eyes, clear enough to be seen in the dark.
...He should have shaken it off.
After all, it was nothing but a false relationship... He shouldn't feel any pain casting it aside or forgetting about it... At least, he thought so.
But...
(Why...?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1228. Why am I looking back this far into it?!)
No... that wasn't even a question. He already knew the reason perfectly well.
Chasing criminals, helping others and being helped.
Celebrating together any time a case was solved.
Comforting and encouraging one another when they failed...
That relationship... was something Hanada really had built up with them.
That's why... any time he looked back on himself carrying out underhanded deeds on Chiba's orders, he realized the despicable hypocrisy of it... and it made him deeply miserable.
Why couldn't he live like that from the beginning...?!
"...Hanada-kun."

"I... I always hated you!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1230. No matter what happens, you're always able to stand right back up with that calm look on your face!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1231. Even when someone maliciously blocks your path, you always find another way to overcome your obstacles!"
"And you're able to gain allies without even realizing it, and their support allows you to accomplish absurd things!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1233. ...Just like today!!"
"You're able to do what I never could... Things I gave up on, saying they were impossible. But you're able to make it all take shape!"
"Why do you alone get to be so lucky?!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1236. Why couldn't I be blessed with the opportunities, the environment, the supporters, and the strength that you had?!"
"I can't accept it...!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1238. I just can't accept it!!!"
"You... your very existence denies my entire way of life!"

"Every single person betrayed me and disgraced me!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1241. I could no longer trust anything, so I hated them and was hated in return!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1242. They decide everything based on whether it's good or bad for them, and force it on me!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1243. I've spent my entire life enduring that!!"
No... The truth is, Hanada knew.
That Tomoe was in the right... and he was wrong.
It wasn't luck, power, or talent that he lacked. ...It was courage.
The belief that his effort and patience would someday pay off.
The belief that his hardship and misfortune would end one day.
Holding on to hope and continuing to believe in that... Having a strong, firm will to always step forward and build the foundation of the future.
But... Hanada threw that all away in one fell swoop. And he made all the excuses he could think of to defend himself... while continuing to run away.
That... was the key difference between himself and Tomoe.
And... he didn't need to be told that now. He already knew. He knew more than enough!!
"Hanada-kun, you..."
"Still... Still!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1245. If I were to acknowledge you, it'd be the same as admitting my entire life up until now has been nothing but pitiful, worthless misery!"
"All the mud I've crawled through, all the blood I've shed, it would be worth as much as a pile of rocks! I'd want to die!"
"So... I'm going to kill you, here and now...!@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1248. This is the one path I've chosen for as long as I've liiived!!!"
As Hanada let out that sorrowful howl... a gunshot rang out loud.
Time came to a complete halt.
The surrounding air stiffened like it had frozen over.
The whole area was bathed in an ear-splitting silence.
And then.
"...@k@vS14/32/VT4Bb_hanada1250b.Gh... Aah...!!"
Hanada let out a moan... and then collapsed to the ground.
His outstretched hand dropped the pistol... and he crouched down with a look of agony on his face.
Tomoe stood there stunned, gazing at him... but when she suddenly heard footsteps approaching from behind, she turned toward them.
And standing before her... was Yamaoki, holding a gun aloft.
Then the other investigators rushed past him and approached Tomoe all at once.
"Minai-san, are you all right?!"
"You dumbass... That was beyond reckless!!"
Words of crude relief and recognition of a job well done came flying through the air.
Every last one of them was warm and kind... making the pain and numbness in her entire body feel better immediately.
With the tension broken off by that rush of comfort... Tomoe's legs gave out and she immediately collapsed.
"...?!@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1238. M-Minai-san!"
Fujita was standing by her side, and rushed to catch her body before she hit the ground.
...Then he gasped when he felt the blood soaking into his suit, and immediately shouted for the medical team to come.
"Hang in there, Minai-san!@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1240. We'll get you to a hospital right away!@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1241. Andou-san, bring a car over here!"
"On it!!"
In her rapidly fading consciousness, Tomoe suddenly lifted her face from Fujita's chest and turned her head.
Off in the distance... she could make out several investigators surrounding Hanada.
Hanada was clinging to his sides and despondently hanging his head. Then, just as one of the investigators was about to cuff his hands... Yamaoki suddenly called out "wait!"
"...? What's wrong, Chief Yamaoki?"
"...Tomoe-kun, go on now.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1296b. Arrest the perp."
"Arrest the suspect.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1298. Bring this to an end... with your own hands."
"Wh... what are you saying, Chief?!@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1243. Minai-san is wounded... Can't you tell she's seriously injured?!@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1244. Instead, let me..."
"Go on now, Tomoe-kun!@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1300. This... is your duty."
His gaze was full of intense emotion.
And the passion in his voice resonated with encouragement.
And... not his words, but the emotions behind them... were able to reach Tomoe's heart.
...That's right, it's not over yet.
My "duty" is... still not complete...!
Tomoe gently left Fujita's grip... then dragged her wounded body to slowly and unsteadily step forward.
One step... then another.
Every step she took sent a rush of intense pain through her entire body, making her feel faint.
"...Ah, haah, haah...!"
...Her breath was wheezy. A foul smell emerged from the back of her throat as she coughed, and blood came spilling from her lips.
Then Tomoe accidentally misstepped midway through her approach and got her legs tangled, then fell down hard on her knees.
"M-Minai-san!@k@vS14/31/VT4Bb_fujita1246. Are you all ri...?!"
"Fujita, stop!@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1302. Let her do this... on her own two legs."
Fujita tried to run over to her as soon as he saw her stumble, but Yamaoki's outburst brought him to a halt.
Then, he immediately turned toward him to protest... but when he saw the look on Yamaoki's face, he realized what he was getting at.
Tomoe's face twisted in anguish as she propped herself up with her elbows against the asphalt... and at last, she was on her feet again.
Did her wounds reopen...? Blood came flowing down her forehead, running across her eyes and blurring her field of view.
Nevertheless... she kept on walking.
Tomoe wouldn't stop moving her increasingly heavy legs... and little by little, she kept dragging them forward.
Takayashiki and the other investigators all silently gazed at her... offering her their encouragement.
...Yes.
This was the important promise... that Tomoe inherited from her father.
A testament to the strong, deep... and long-lasting bond between the living and the dead.
...Eventually, the time that seemed to go on forever passed.
After such a long, long journey... Tomoe was finally standing in front of Hanada.
Fujita rushed to her side, then pulled a set of handcuffs out of his jacket and held them out to her.
And then...
The handcuffs let out a light dry click as she attached them to Hanada's wrists.
On that cue, the investigators holding him from both sides gave him a tug... and then they marched off toward the back of the building.
Even after they disappeared... Tomoe continued staring off in the direction they went with a vacant look in her eyes.
...She couldn't speak.
More than that, she couldn't even think. It was like the entire inside of her head had turned white... She felt nothing, like there was a gaping hole in her chest.
"...Tomoe-kun."
"It's over.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1305. At last... This is it."
Before she knew it, Yamaoki was standing by her side, offering her those words... and she nodded back to him.
...This is it.
With this... it's all over?
The case she was desperately pursuing, that she risked her life to solve... was finally over?
...She still couldn't believe it.
In her heart and in her mind... somehow, she still couldn't feel the sensation that it was truly over.
For twelve long years... Tomoe dedicated her life to a single purpose.
She sacrificed so much, every single day... all for the sake of personally catching the criminal who murdered her parents.
No matter how much she tried to enjoy things... she couldn't wholeheartedly do it.
Even when she went to bed at night... that single thought always revived in her sleepy thoughts.
It was agonizing.
And depressing.
And lonely.
...And painful.
How many times did she think it would be easier to just forget it and move on?
How many times did she think of excuses why she should be forgiven if she gave up?
...It's unreasonable.
...Impossible.
...Give up.
...Go ahead and compromise.
She accepted comforting gestures from others... but at the same time, her feelings were tortured.
Her anger was on the verge of turning into hatred.
Her sorrow was about to turn into resentment.
She wondered how many times she'd tasted those feelings, trying to appease herself while lingering in that darkness... At some point she lost count.
But...
At last...
It was truly...
"...Well done."

"Yuusuke, Nobumi-san, and Madoka-kun... I'm sure they're all proud of you.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1308. And of course, so am I.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1309. Seriously... after twelve long years, you did a fine job.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1310. So... isn't that enough?@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1311. Come on... can you be satisfied with this...?"

"No one else could shoulder the burden you've carried.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1313. ...And yet you endured it until the final moment.@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1314. No matter what pain, sadness, or anguish may come of this... no one should ever say a word of criticism to you about it."
"...Yeah, I won't let them say it!@k@vS14/30/VT4Bb_yamaoki1316. I swear, I'll...!"
Yeah... that's right.
Right now... it's fine to cry...
At last... I...
It's fine for me to believe... that it's all over...!!
"Uu... uu, uwaaaaaaaaaahhh...!!!"
...The tears came nonstop.
She could no longer see anything around her.
With Tomoe in that state... Yamaoki...
Pulled her into his large chest and held her tight.
(Hey, Yuusuke. Are you watching this?)
(Your... or rather, our little girl really did give it her all... until the very end.)
(...She deserves praise.)
(If you can call out to her from somewhere, tell her she did a job well done.)
(That you're truly... proud of your daughter...!!)
Yamaoki looked up to the heavens... and did his best to call out the heavy emotions stirring inside his heart.
Beyond his gaze were the moon, the stars... and the night sky. He thought he could see someone's face up there, even if it was just an illusion.
But he was sure that Tomoe's father was somewhere up there watching over her, and he wanted to believe that he was smiling at her...
